parties.name: Fidesz–KDNP
parties.name_full: Fidesz – Magyar Polgári Szövetség / Kereszténydemokrata Néppárt
parties.name_en: Fidesz – Hungarian Civic Alliance / Christian Democratic People's Party

key_positions.eu_relations: Sovereignist; critical of EU migration policy and rule-of-law conditionality
key_positions.migration: Strongly anti-immigration; 'protect Hungary's borders and Christian identity'
key_positions.economy: Low flat tax, family subsidies (CSOK), strategic national industries
key_positions.rule_of_law: Critics cite democratic backsliding; government rejects characterisation
key_positions.ukraine_russia: Neutral stance; opposes weapons deliveries to Ukraine; maintains ties with Russia

key_positions.eu_relations: Pro-EU; seeks deeper integration and restoration of EU funds
key_positions.migration: Pragmatic; rule-based approach, no mass deportation rhetoric
key_positions.economy: Anti-corruption focus; transparent public procurement; wage growth
key_positions.rule_of_law: Restore judicial independence; free public media; anti-oligarch

key_positions.eu_relations: Eurosceptic; would hold referendum on EU membership
key_positions.ukraine_russia: Pro-Russia; opposes NATO support for Ukraine

parties.name: DK
parties.eu_group: Progressive Alliance of Socialists and Democrats

key_positions.eu_relations: Strongly pro-EU; restore Hungary's standing in European institutions

key_positions.economy: Direct democracy; citizen referendums on key decisions
